content.en:
While Ye Tian was collecting resources, he was also creating the Supreme Ancient Bone Technique, no matter which one could succeed, he could break through to the Bone Transformation Realm.

At this time, many forces in the seams of territorial waters began to concentrate in order to deal with future crises.

And Ye Tian is also making plans, for example, he will integrate massive resources into the Wanlong territorial waters, so as to cultivate the Wanlong territorial waters and upgrade the Wanlong territorial waters.

After all, the advantage of territorial waters is still very large, and it can suppress alien creatures, so as to give yourself an advantage.

If the territorial waters of Wanlong grow to the level of the Taikoo Sea, the human race does not need to move out, and can directly practice in the territorial waters of Wanlong.

For this.

Ye Tian invested countless resources, like many resources in the Hunhe River Boundary Crack, which he secretly got out, and then integrated into the Wanlong Sea.

Gradually, the energy of Wanlong's territorial waters became more and more, and the origin became stronger and stronger.

"Cultivating the territorial waters of Wanlong in this way for an ancient era, even if it is not comparable to the primeval territorial waters, it can also be comparable to the territorial waters of the underworld, no, it can definitely surpass the territorial waters of the underworld!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

......

Wanlong territorial waters.

The human race continued to cultivate the Wanlong territorial sea, built a large number of treasure lands, and integrated countless resources into one territory after another, so that the entire territorial sea continued to be upgraded, so that other Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors were benefited, and they were excited one by one.

"There are more and more resources in Wanlong's territorial waters, which are even richer than the resources in the territorial waters, what else do I want to do in the territorial waters, how comfortable it is to cultivate in Wanlong's territorial waters!"

The Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor muttered.

He also knew that all of this was a benefit brought by the Endless Heavenly Ancestor, and he didn't know how many resources the Endless Heavenly Ancestor had invested, it must be an amount that he couldn't imagine.

Not to mention anything else, just the number of Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the Human Race today is measured in tens of thousands, so you know how many resources Ye Tian has given to the Human Race.

Of course, he couldn't be jealous, after all, Ye Tian and him were not of the same race.

It would be nice if he could rub some benefits!

And the Wanlong territorial sea is getting stronger and stronger, and some of the Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors who are wandering in the outside world have also returned one by one after receiving the news.

Hayabusa Dragon City.

The Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor met one of his ancestors, Hongtong Heavenly Ancestor.

Of course, he was actually not familiar with Hongtong Heavenly Ancestor, but his master's master was just a registered disciple of this Hongtong Heavenly Ancestor, and he had not been in touch many years ago.

I don't know who Hongtong Tianzu received, and now he has run back.

If it weren't for Hongtong Heavenly Ancestor coming back, he would have thought that this person was dead!

"Ancestor, you've been missing for countless years!" said the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor.

"Hey, it's not easy to break through in the outside world, and it has caused a lot of trouble, and I don't dare to come back, for fear of bringing trouble to the territorial waters of my hometown!" Hongtong Heavenly Ancestor smiled and said, "I didn't expect that my vein would even give birth to a five-time Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor!"

The Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor was still in the Blood Transformation Realm five times now, and his strength was much stronger than in the past.

"It's a lot worse than you, Ancestor!"

Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor said modestly.

Hongtong Heavenly Ancestor is a boundary-breaking genius, and his current cultivation has reached the Sixth Blood Transformation Realm, and his real combat power is comparable to that of an ordinary Seven Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor!

With such an existence, it's no wonder that I didn't want to go back to Wanlong's territorial waters before, because I couldn't look down on it!

Of course, he didn't say that.

"I didn't expect the Endless Heavenly Ancestor to come from our Ten Thousand Dragons Territorial Sea!" Hongtong Heavenly Ancestor said with emotion.

"Is the Endless Heavenly Ancestor very famous in the territorial sea realm?"

The Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor has not left the Wanlong Territorial Sea for a long time, and his strength was too weak before, so he didn't know much about the intelligence of the Wanlong Territorial Sea, he only knew that the Endless Heavenly Ancestor was very powerful, but how powerful it was, it was not clear.

Hongtong Heavenly Ancestor said: "You don't know how powerful the Endless Heavenly Ancestor is, but I can't blame you, after all, you haven't been out of the Ten Thousand Dragons Territorial Sea. In this way, you should know that the Nine Blood Transformation Realm, even if it is a Boundary-Breaking genius of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm, they are all ants in front of the Endless Heavenly Ancestor!"

"What !!!"

The Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor was shocked.

He felt that no matter how powerful the Endless Heavenly Ancestor was, it was estimated that he was still a boundary-breaking genius of the Eight Blood Transformation Realms, otherwise how could he be so boasted by the Hongtong Heavenly Ancestor!

But now Hongtong Heavenly Ancestor actually said that the boundary-breaking geniuses of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm were all ants in front of the Endless Heavenly Ancestor!

Hongtong Heavenly Ancestor continued: "Above the boundary-breaking genius is the primeval-level genius, any primordial-level genius can kill the boundary-breaking genius of the same level in an instant, and the Endless Heavenly Ancestor is now an ancient-level genius of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm, and it is rumored that the Endless Heavenly Ancestor is not far away from surpassing the Nine Blood Transformation Realm! We have worked hard to have an Endless Heavenly Ancestor in the Wanlong Territorial Sea, and now the Endless Heavenly Ancestor is vigorously cultivating the Wanlong Territorial Sea, and he must cultivate this place as a base camp. "

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor is really powerful!"

Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor sighed.

And it wasn't just the two of them who had a conversation like this, many Blood Transformation Realms were boasting about the Endless Heavenly Ancestor, and even the Terran was boasting about the Endless Heavenly Ancestor Ye Tian.

......

Before you know it, another primeval era is about to pass.

At this time.

Ye Tian was doing his best to create the Supreme Ancient Bone Technique, as for the resources, he had already given up and couldn't get them at all.

In order to create the Supreme Ancient Bone Technique as soon as possible, he used all the other replica bodies to experiment, and experimented wildly, so as to strive to make the Ancient Bone Technique that he had continuously improved and created, so that it could be perfected to the highest level.

After countless experiments, creations, and perceptions, the Supreme Ancient Bone Technique is finally about to be created.

this day.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian successfully created another supreme primeval bone technique, and immediately merged into the last immeasurable bone.

Rumble!!!!

This immeasurable bone finally began to change as well, and with the bone transformation of this immeasurable bone, the entire body began to transform.

This is a breakthrough in the great realm and a qualitative change!

Ye Tian's breakthrough was carried out in the territorial waters of Wanlong, in this way, his breakthrough to the bone transformation realm would also cause the transformation of the territorial waters, which was good for the territorial waters.

Airplanes!!!!!!

A huge phantom covering the entire Wanlong territorial sea appeared, which was an anomaly formed by Ye Tian's breakthrough aura escaping.

At this moment, countless living beings were all kneeling on the ground, and even the bone transformation realm that was high above was moving slowly.

That's the horror of the Bone Transformation Realm!

Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor, Hongtong Heavenly Ancestor and other Blood Transformation Realms all showed shocked expressions when they saw this scene.

"What's going on?"

Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor asked.

Hongtong Heavenly Ancestor said with a shocked face: "This is a breakthrough, the Endless Heavenly Ancestor has actually broken the shackles and promoted to the realm above the Nine Blood Transformation Realm, the human race is about to become a top overlord-level force!"
